高胤桢（朝鲜语：고윤정 Go Youn-Jung；1996年4月22日－），美术系高才生！绘画能力了得，但因在大学里发觉同样绘画好的人很多，开始对绘画前途产生怀疑，从而开始探索其他行业，在泰坦尼克花絮中开始对影视业感兴趣，从而踏入演员行业，韩国女演员。

2016年3月，曾以《대학내일》第771号的封面模特露面。2019年3月，通过tvN《会读心术的那小子》正式以演员身份出道。2020年1月，与朴宝剑一起出演李承哲的《我非常爱你( Kakao Page Webtoon Moonlight Sculptor OST) MV》，成为热门话题。2020年9月，出演Netflix原创剧《非常校护档案》，饰演“女高中生崔有珍”；随后在2020年12月，出演《Sweet Home》 ，饰演“朴宥莉”，因为超高颜值而受到许多关注。2021年4月，在JTBC电视剧《Law School》中饰演全艺瑟一角。

有着开挂般的演艺生涯，出道作品	《会读心术的那小子》代表作品	《Sweet Home》《Law School》《还魂》《还魂2》
data.name: 高胤桢

data.biography:
Go Youn-jung (고윤정) is a South Korean actress who was born on April 22, 1996. She made her first public appearance as a model for University Tomorrow magazine. She debuted as an actress on the television series He Is Psychometric (2019), followed it with supporting roles in Sweet Home (2020) and Law School (2021), and after her breakthrough role in Alchemy of Souls (2022), has since become one of South Korea's most sought-after actresses.

She is best known for her roles in Moving (2023) and Resident Playbook (2025).
data.name: Go Youn-jung

data.biography: Η Γκο Γιούν-γιάνγκ (Go Youn-jung) είναι Νοτιοκορεάτισσα ηθοποιός και μοντέλο. data.biography:
Go, 22 Nisan 1996'da Güney Kore'nin Seul kentinde doğdu. Go, çağdaş sanat eğitimi aldığı Seul Kadın Üniversitesi'ne gitti.

2016 yılında, şans eseri, ilk olarak üniversite öğrencileri için bir dergi olan University Tomorrow'un 771. sayısı için kapak modeli olarak göründü.

Mart 2019'da tvN'nin Pazartesi-Salı dizisi He Is Psychometric'de Kim So-hyun olarak oyuncu olarak ilk çıkışını yaptı.

İlk çıkışının başında çeşitli resimlere ve reklamlara ek olarak, Ocak 2020'de Park Bo-gum ile birlikte Lee Seung-chul'un "I Love You a Lot" şarkısının müzik videosunda kadın başrol olarak yer aldı ve Kakao Page webtoonu Moonlight Sculptor'ın OST'si olarak kullanıldı ve olağanüstü görünümüyle dikkat çekti.

Eylül 2020'de Netflix orijinal dizisi The School Nurse Files'da 'hazır liseli bir kız olan Choi Yoo-jin' olarak rol aldı ve Aralık ayında Netflix orijinal draması Sweet Home'da Park Yu-ri rolünü oynadı.

Nisan 2021'de JTBC dizisi Law School'da en iyi üniversitenin bir hukuk öğrencisi olan Jeon Ye-seul rolünü oynadı ve ilk birkaç dakikada bile dikkatleri üzerine çekti ve dizinin ortasından itibaren önemli olaylara liderlik eden bir karakter olarak oynadı.

Haziran 2022'de tvN dizisi Alchemy of Souls'un 1 sezonunda 'Naksu' olarak özel bir görünüm kazandı ve Aralık ayında yayınlanan 2 sezonu ile Naksu'nun yüzüne sahip gizemli bir tanrıça olan kadın kahraman 'Jin Bu-yeon' olarak göründü.

Ağustos 2022'de Go, Hunt filmi ile ilk kez ekrana çıktı. Film bir gişe başarısı elde etti ve başarılı bir ekran başlangıcı oldu.

Ağustos 2023'te Disney+ dramasında Moving'de sonsuz oynama yeteneğine sahip bir psişik ve fizik kolejinde öğrenci olan Jang Hee-soo olarak rol aldı.[22] 25 yaşında 19 yaşında liseli bir kız rolünü oynamasına rağmen, rolü hiçbir fark olmadan mükemmel bir şekilde oynadı ve iyi karşılandı. Temmuz 2023'te yönetmen Shin Won-ho'nun yaratıcı olarak katıldığı Resident Playbook dizisinin kadın başrol oyuncusu olarak seçildi. (GyR)

data.biography:
Shailene Diann Woodley (born November 15, 1991) is an American actress. Born in San Bernardino, California, Woodley was raised in Simi Valley, and started modeling at the age of four and began acting professionally in minor television roles. She first gained prominence for her starring role as Amy Juergens in the ABC Family teen drama series The Secret Life of the American Teenager (2008–2013). She subsequently starred in the films The Descendants (2011) and The Spectacular Now (2013), receiving a nomination for her first Golden Globe Award for the former.

Woodley achieved wider recognition for her starring role as a teenaged cancer patient in the romantic drama The Fault in Our Stars (2014) and as Beatrice Prior in the science-fiction trilogy The Divergent Series (2014–2016). She played a sexual assault survivor in the HBO drama series Big Little Lies (2017–2019), for which she was nominated for a Golden Globe Award and a Primetime Emmy Award. She has since played supporting roles in the films Snowden (2016), The Mauritanian (2021) and The Fallout (2021), and starred in Adrift (2018) and The Last Letter from Your Lover (2021).

Woodley is also an environmental activist and serves as a board member of the political action committee, Our Revolution.
data.name: Shailene Woodley

Shailene Diann Woodley (Simi Valley, Califórnia, 15 de novembro de 1991) é uma atriz americana que se tornou conhecida após sua performance no filme The Descendants, a qual lhe rendeu uma indicação ao Globo de Ouro.

Foi escalada como protagonista para a adaptação cinematográfica do aclamado livro The Fault in Our Stars, de John Green, como Hazel Grace Lancaster. Seu primeiro trabalho de sucesso foi na série de televisão The Secret Life of the American Teenager, onde interpretava a protagonista Amy.

Shailene Diann Woodley (née le 15 novembre 1991) est une actrice américaine. Elle a d'abord joué le rôle principal, Amy Juergens, dans la série ABC Family, The Secret Life of the American Teenager (2008-13). Elle a ensuite joué dans le drame américain indépendant The Descendants (2011), pour lequel elle a reçu l'Independent Spirit Award de la meilleure actrice de soutien et une nomination aux Golden Globe pour la meilleure actrice de soutien - Motion Picture, et The Spectacular Now (2013), recevant le prix spécial du jury pour son interprétation au Sundance Film Festival 2013 et une nomination au Independent Spirit Award pour la meilleure actrice principale.

Woodley a remporté un succès commercial en tant que protagoniste principal, Beatrice "Tris" Prior, dans The Divergent Series, et en tant que Hazel Grace Lancaster dans The Fault in Our Stars (2014).

Американская модель и актриса. Получила известность благодаря роли Эми Юргенс в телесериале «Тайная жизнь американского подростка» (2008—2013), эта роль обеспечила Шейлин пять номинаций на премию «Teen Choice Awards»

data.biography:
SHAILENE WOODLEY leginkább a díjnyertes alakítása miatt ismerhetjük, amit az író-rendező Alexander Payne “Az utódok” (The Descendants) Oscar-jelölt filmjében nyújtott George Clooney oldalán. A filmben nyújtott alakításért több elismerést is kapott, többek között egy 2012-es Independent Spirit Award® díjat, egy National Board of Review Díjat, és Golden Globe® és Critics 'Choice Award jelölést (mint legjobb női mellékszereplő).

Woodley nemrég játszot Gregg Araki „White Bird in a Blizzard” című filmjében, melynek premierje a 2014-es Sundance Filmfesztivál, míg a nemzetközi debütálása a francia Deauville film Festival volt.

Woodley tehetséges és sokoldalú színésznői képességeit a kritikusok által is elismert „Csillagainkban a hiba” (The Fault in Our Stars), John Green rendkívül népszerű regényének adaptációjában mutathatta meg igazán. A film uralta a jegypénztári eladásokat a nyitó hétvégén, (több mint 250.000.000 dollár világszerte) és Woodley számára egy People Choice Díjat, egy Broadcast Film Critics Díjat és egy Teen Choice Díjat hozott a konyhára. Közvetlenül előtte szerepelt „Az élet habzsolva jó” (The Spectacular Now) Miles Teller oldalán, amiért megosztva vehették át a zsűri különdíját a Sundance Filmfesztiválon 2013-ban, valamint Woodleyt jelölték Gotham és Independent Spirit Díjakra is, mint a legjobb női főszereplő. „A beavatott” (Divergent) filmben bizonyította, hogy a nagyszabású filmekben is ugyanúgy helytáll.

Woodley hamarosan Joseph Gordon Levitt oldalán játszik majd Oliver Stone „Snowden” filmjében, mely az amerikai számítógépes szakember, Edward Snowden életét dolgozza fel, az egykori CIA alkalmazottét, aki kiszivárogtatta az NSA bizalmas információit.

Woodley öt éves korában kezdte karrierjét, az elején reklámokban, majd az 1999-es „Replacing Dad” telesorozatban kapott először szerepet a kétszeres Oscár-jelölt Mary McDonell oldalán.

Shailene Diann Woodley (15 novembre 1991) è un'attrice americana. Il suo primo ruolo importante è stato quello di Amy Juergens, protagonista della serie ABC Family "La vita segreta di una teenager americana" (2008-2013). È poi apparsa nel dramma americano "Paradiso amaro" (2011), per il quale ha ricevuto l'Independent Spirit Award come miglior attrice non protagonista e una nomination ai Golden Globe, sempre come miglior attrice non protagonista. Per "The Spectacular Now" (2013) ha ricevuto il Premio speciale della giuria al Sundance Film Festival 2013 e una nomination all'Independent Spirit Award.

Ha ottenuto successo commerciale con la trilogia cinematografica di "Divergent" (2014-2016), tratta dai libri di Veronica Roth, in cui interpreta la protagonista Beatrice "Tris" Prior, e nel ruolo di Hazel Grace Lancaster in "Colpa delle stelle" (2014), basato sull'omonimo romanzo di John Green.

Woodley è un'appassionata attivista politica e ambientale.  Con sua madre ha fondato l'organizzazione no-profit All It Takes, un programma di leadership giovanile che mira a educare i giovani a praticare empatia, compassione e responsabilità, nella speranza di promuovere cambiamenti positivi e sostenibili per se stessi, gli altri e l'ambiente.  Ha appoggiato Bernie Sanders per la presidenza nel 2016 e nel 2020.

Nel 2016, ha protestato contro il Dakota Access Pipeline, un gasdotto sotterraneo per il trasporto di petrolio. In ottobre, è stata arrestata per violazione di domicilio a Saint Anthony, North Dakota; si è dichiarata colpevole ed è stata condannata ad un anno di libertà vigilata.

A metà del 2016, Woodley è entrata a far parte del consiglio di Our Revolution, un'organizzazione politica volta a educare gli elettori, coinvolgere le persone nel processo politico e lavorare per organizzare campagne ed eleggere leader progressisti.

Il 29 settembre 2016, al 20 ° anniversario dei Global Green Environmental Awards, ha ricevuto il premio alla leadership ambientale nell'industria dell'intrattenimento per la fondazione di All it Takes. Nell'ottobre 2016 le è stato invece conferito il Female EMA Futures Award durante i 26th Annual Environmental Media Association Awards (EMA).  Nel luglio 2019, Woodley è diventata ambasciatrice degli oceani per Greenpeace e ha intrapreso una spedizione di tre settimane nel Mar dei Sargassi, per studiare l'impatto di plastiche e microplastiche sulla vita marina e documentare l'importanza di proteggere questo ecosistema unico attraverso un nuovo trattato globale sull'oceano che sta venendo discusso alle Nazioni Unite.

Shailene Diann Woodley (* 15. November 1991 in Simi Valley, Kalifornien) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin.

Shailene Woodley besuchte die Valley View Middle School, anschließend die Simi Valley Highschool.

Bereits im Alter von fünf Jahren begann sie zu schauspielern. Neben dem Schauspielern schreibt sie Scripts, dreht eigene Filme oder fotografiert. Außerdem probiert sie gern Extremsportarten wie Parasailing, Bungee-Jumping und Stuntfliegen aus.

Von 2008 bis 2013 spielte sie die Rolle der Amy Juergens in der US-amerikanischen ABC-Family-Jugendserie The Secret Life of the American Teenager. In der Fernsehserie spielte sie eine zu Anfang 15-Jährige, die entdeckt, dass sie schwanger ist.

Kritikerlob brachte Woodley 2011 die Darstellung der rebellischen Tochter von George Clooney in Alexander Paynes Tragikomödie The Descendants – Familie und andere Angelegenheiten ein. Für ihr Porträt der 17-jährigen Alex gewann sie den Hollywood Spotlight Award, wurde von der National Board of Review als beste Nebendarstellerin ausgezeichnet, war für den Golden Globe als beste Nebendarstellerin nominiert und hat bei den MTV Movie Awards 2012 den Award als beste Newcomerin erhalten. Beim Sundance Film Festival 2013 wurde sie für ihre Rolle im Film The Spectacular Now – Perfekt ist jetzt gemeinsam mit Miles Teller mit dem U.S. Dramatic Special Jury Award for Acting ausgezeichnet. 2014 übernahm sie die Hauptrolle in Die Bestimmung – Divergent, der Verfilmung des Romans Die Bestimmung von Veronica Roth. Sie spielt auch in den beiden Fortsetzungen von 2015 und 2016 die Rolle der wagemutigen „Tris Prior“. Im Film The Amazing Spider-Man 2: Rise of Electro sollte sie einen kurzen Auftritt als Mary Jane Watson haben, allerdings wurden die Szenen vor der Veröffentlichung aus dem fertigen Film geschnitten. In der Verfilmung von John Greens Jugendbuch Das Schicksal ist ein mieser Verräter spielt sie die weibliche Hauptrolle Hazel Grace Lancaster, eine 16-jährige Krebspatientin. Für diese Rolle erhielt sie den MTV Movie Award 2015 als beste Schauspielerin.

Am 10. Oktober 2016 wurde Woodley als Teilnehmerin einer friedlichen Protest-Demonstration gegen die geplante Dakota-Access-Ölpipeline in Fort Yates in North Dakota in der Standing Rock Sioux Reservation wegen unbefugten Betretens festgenommen. Sie ist im Vorstand der Organisation Our Revolution, die während des US-Präsidentschaftswahlkampfs 2016 von Bernie Sanders gegründet wurde.

2017 wurde sie in die Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences (AMPAS) aufgenommen, die jährlich die Oscars vergibt.

Seit 2020 war sie mit Aaron Rodgers, dem Quarterback der Green Bay Packers, liiert und seit 2021 mit ihm verlobt.

Im Februar 2022 wurde im People-Magazin die Trennung des Paares bekannt gegeben.

data.overview: Thế Giới Hoàn Mỹ là bộ phim được cải biên từ tiểu thuyết cùng tên của tác giả Thần Đông, kể về câu chuyện thiếu niên Thạch Hạo sinh ra với Chí Tôn Cốt nhưng lại bị người cùng tộc hãm hại đoạt mất, tính mạng nguy nan, sau đó được cha mẹ gửi đến tổ địa nuôi dưỡng. Tuy nhiên, quá trình trưởng thành này không hề dễ dàng. Hắn liên tục gặp phải khó khăn trắc trở, mọi điều xui rủi không ngừng giáng xuống, dường như lần nào cũng làm hắn phải chết đi sống lại. Cũng chính những thử thách này đã thể hiện được sức chiến đấu mạnh mẽ của hắn, đồng thời tôi luyện ra được một Thạch Hạo vững vàng với thực lực vô địch, quét sạch dị tộc, đại chiến với Thương Đế, Hồng Đế, Vũ Đế suốt 3 vạn năm mà vẫn giành được thắng lợi, bảo vệ được quê nhà và người thương.

data.biography: Ken Watanabe (born October 21, 1959) is a Japanese stage, film, and television actor. To English-speaking audiences he is known for playing tragic hero characters, such as General Tadamichi Kuribayashi in Letters from Iwo Jima and Lord Katsumoto Moritsugu in The Last Samurai, for which he was nominated for the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actor. Among other awards, he has won the Japan Academy Prize for Best Actor twice, in 2007 for Memories of Tomorrow and in 2010 for Shizumanu Taiyō. He is also known for his roles in director Christopher Nolan's Hollywood blockbusters Batman Begins and Inception.
data.name: Ken Watanabe

data.biography: Ken Watanabe (né le 21 octobre 1959) est un acteur japonais de théâtre, de cinéma et de télévision. Pour le public anglophone, il est connu pour jouer des héros tragiques, comme le général Tadamichi Kuribayashi dans Letters from Iwo Jima et Lord Katsumoto Moritsugu dans The Last Samurai, pour lequel il a été nominé pour l'Oscar du meilleur second rôle. Entre autres récompenses, il a remporté à deux reprises le Japan Academy Prize du meilleur acteur, en 2007 pour Memories of Tomorrow et en 2010 pour Shizumanu Taiyō. Il est également connu pour ses rôles dans les superproductions hollywoodiennes du réalisateur Christopher Nolan, Batman Begins et Inception.

Ken Watanabe ist ein japanischer Schauspieler.  In Japan als Darsteller in Komödien, Dramen und Actionfilmen etabliert, trat er auch in mehreren Hollywoodfilmen auf, meist in prägnanten Nebenrollen.

2003 feierte er, nach einer Leukämie Erkrankung, ein sensationelles Comeback und seinen internationalen Durchbruch mit Last Samurai. Für diesen Film wurde Watanabe sowohl für einen Golden Globe Award als auch für einen Oscar als bester Nebendarsteller nominiert. Damit war er erst der sechste asiatische Schauspieler, der eine Oscarnominierung erhielt.

Watanabe hat in Batman Begins einen Schurken (Ra’s al Ghuls Doppelgänger) und in Die Geisha einen edlen Charakter verkörpert. Für Clint Eastwood spielte er in Letters from Iwo Jima den heroisch scheiternden japanischen General Tadamichi Kuribayashi.

2006 hatte Ken Watanabe einen großen Erfolg in Yukihiko Tsutsumis Film Ashita no Kioku, in dem er einen erfolgreichen Geschäftsmann verkörpert, dessen Leben durch frühe Anzeichen einer Alzheimer-Krankheit dramatisch verändert wird. Für diesen Film erhielt er sämtliche wichtigen japanischen Filmpreise.

Im Jahr 2010 erschien der Film Inception, in diesem spielt er neben Leonardo DiCaprio und Ellen Page einen japanischen Geschäftsmann.

2014 war er im zweiten amerikanischen Remake zur Godzilla-Filmreihe als japanischer Wissenschaftler Dr. Ishiro Serizawa zu sehen.

Quelle: Wikipedia

data.biography: Ken Watanabe ( 21 de octubre de 1959) es un actor japonés, principalmente conocido por sus roles de héroe trágico en las películas El último samurái (2003) y Cartas desde Iwo Jima (2006), y sus actuaciones en Memorias de una geisha (2005) e Inception (2010).

data.biography:
渡边谦（日语：渡辺 謙，假名：わたなべ けん，英语：Ken Watanabe，1959年10月21日—）是一名日本男演员。出生于新潟县北鱼沼郡小出町（今鱼沼市）的一个教师家庭。他名字里的“谦”字，是为纪念生在新潟县的战国武将上杉谦信而取。渡边从小就喜欢小号，在县立小出高中的管乐社团里担任小号手。1978年中学毕业后就前往东京，寻找作为一名演员的机会。他的第一个角色是在著名导演蜷川幸雄的《下谷万年町物语》。1985年主演了著名导演伊丹十三的经典影片《蒲公英》。1987年出演了NHK大河剧《独眼龙政宗》，并饰演主角伊达政宗，使他成为了真正被观众熟知的演员。而后出演的《海洋和毒品》使他获得了一系列的奖项。

1990年正直事业高峰的渡边谦被诊断患有患败血症，他顽强抗争病魔10余载。于1998年复出出演了《侦探物语》。进入新世纪后，渡边谦先后出演了《太空游侠》、《千年之恋·源氏物语》等多部影片。从2003年开始，渡边谦又达到了一个新的高峰。先是凭借在汤姆·克鲁斯的《最后的武士》中的演出，赢得奥斯卡最佳男配角提名，后又参演了《蝙蝠侠前传》、《北之零年》，并在《艺伎回忆录》中担当第一男主角。2007年他还出现在吴宇森的作品《赤壁》中，扮演曹操。渡边谦至今仍傲立影坛，堪称日本艺人的传奇。
data.name: 渡边谦

data.biography: Kensaku Watanabe (Niigata, 21 de outubro de 1959) é um ator japonês. Foi nomeado para um Oscar e para o prêmio Globo de Ouro em 2004, na categoria de melhor ator coadjuvante, pelo filme O Último Samurai. Foi também indicado na categoria de melhor ator (2007) e melhor ator coadjuvante (1999, 2002 e 2003) pela Academia Japonesa de Cinema. Atuou também em Batman Begins e Memórias de uma gueixa (ambos de 2005), Cartas de Iwo Jima (2006) e A Origem, Conspiração Xangai (2010) e Godzilla (2014) "Transformers: A Era da Extinção" e "Transformers: O Último Cavaleiro".
data.name: Ken Watanabe

data.biography: Watanabe Ken là một diễn viên nổi tiếng người Nhật Bản. Những khán giả xem phim tiếng Anh thường biết đến ông với các vai diễn anh hùng bi kịch như tướng Kuribayashi Tadamichi trong phim Letters from Iwo Jima hay lãnh chúa Moritsugu Katsumoto trong Võ sĩ đạo cuối cùng, vai diễn đem lại cho ông một đề cử giải Oscar cho nam diễn viên phụ xuất sắc nhất. Trong số các giải thưởng khác, ông đã hai lần giành giải thưởng Viện hàn lâm Nhật Bản cho nam diễn viên xuất sắc nhất, năm 2007 với phim Memories of Tomorrow và năm 2010 với phim Shizumanu Taiyō. Ông cũng tham gia diễn xuất trong các siêu phẩm của đạo diễn Hollywood Christopher Nolan là Batman Begins và Inception, phim bom tấn đạo diễn trẻ Gareth Edwards là Gozilla (tiếng Nhật: ゴジラ Gojira), và Ông vua tài giỏi trong vai Thiên hoàng Minh Trị.

와타나베 켄(1959년 10월 21일 출생)은 일본의 연극, 영화, 텔레비전 배우입니다. 영어권 관객들에게 그는 비극적인 영웅 캐릭터를 연기한 것으로 알려져 있는데, 영화 <이오지마에서 온 편지>의 쿠리바야시 타다미치 장군과 <라스트 사무라이>의 가츠모토 모리츠구 경을 연기했으며, 이 작품으로 아카데미 남우조연상 후보에 올랐습니다. 일본 아카데미상 남우주연상을 두 번 수상한 그는 2007년 <내일의 추억>과 2010년 <시즈마누 태양>으로 수상했습니다. 크리스토퍼 놀란 감독의 할리우드 블록버스터 <배트맨 비긴즈>와 <인셉션>에서의 배역으로도 잘 알려져 있습니다.
data.name: 와타나베 켄

data.biography:
渡边谦1959年10月21日出生于日本新潟县北鱼沼郡（现为鱼沼市）小出町的一个教师家庭。他名字里的"谦"字，是为纪念生在新潟县的战国武将上杉谦信而取。渡边从小就喜欢小号，在县立小出高中的管乐社团里担任小号手。1978年中学毕业后就前往东京，寻找作为一名演员的机会。他的第一个角色是在著名导演Ninagawa Yukio的Shitaya Mannencho Monogatari。1985年主演了著名导演伊丹十三的经典影片《蒲公英》Tampopo。1987年出演了NHK的电视剧《taiga》，使他成为了真正被观众熟知的演员。而后出演的《海洋和毒品》Umi to dokuyaku 使他获得了一系列的奖项。

　　1990年正直事业高峰的渡边谦被诊断患有患败血症，他顽强抗争病魔10余载。于1998年复出出演了《侦探物语》(Kizuna)。进入新的世纪后渡边谦先后出演了《太空游侠》、《千年之恋·源氏物语》等多部影片。 从2003年开始，渡边谦又达到了一个新的高峰。先是凭借在汤姆·克鲁斯的《最后的武士》中的演出，赢得奥斯卡最佳男配角提名，后又参演了《蝙蝠侠前传》， 《北之零年》并在《艺伎回忆录》中担当第一男主角。2007年他还会出现在吴宇森的作品《赤壁》中，扮演曹操。渡边谦至今仍傲立影坛，堪称日本艺人的传奇。

　　渡边谦自有一种威严和坚毅的特质。鲜为人知的是，15年前，这位酷哥在事业一片光明之际，突然被诊断出患有血癌，很残酷的，他被迫辞演当时日本的古装大制作《天与地》。在困境面前，渡边决心不向病魔低头，在经历密集的治疗后，他还是回到了演艺圈，并且更加卖命地演戏，“唯有用尽我一切心力去演，我才能忘掉我生病了这件事。”渡边谦克服逆境的乐观精神，让人啧啧称奇。如今，这个日本实力派演员，还踏上了好莱坞的征途。在接受媒体采访时，渡边谦自信地表示，自己演出的方式是不把喜怒哀乐夸张地表现在表面，这在好莱坞是较少见的。同时，渡边谦还不时展现出幽默来，当他被问到在日本他和靓佬汤谁比较有名时，他答道： “对40岁以上的老影迷来说，我可是很出名的。他们铁定认得我，但有些可分不出汤姆·克鲁斯和汤姆·汉克斯到底谁是谁。”
data.name: 渡边谦

data.biography:
Ken Watanabe (Kensaku Watanabe), 21 Ekim 1959 tarihinde Koide, Niigata, Japonya'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Annesi ve babası öğretmen olan Watanabe, çocukluk yıllarında müziğe ilgi duydu ve lise bandosunda trompet çaldı. Bir konservatuara girmeyi hedeflerken, babasının rahatsızlığı nedeniyle ailesinin maddi sıkıntıya düşmesi üzerine bu hayalinden vazgeçmek zorunda kaldı. Mezuniyetinin ardından oyunculuğa yönelerek Tokyo'ya taşındı ve prestijli tiyatro grubu En'e katıldı. Sahne performanslarıyla dikkat çeken oyuncu, kısa sürede televizyon dünyasına adım attı.

Japonya'daki şöhretini, özellikle samuray rolleriyle (jidaigeki) sağlamlaştırdı. NHK'nin popüler tarihi dizisi "Dokuganryu Masamune"de (1987) canlandırdığı Date Masamune karakteri, onu ülkesinde bir ev ismi haline getirdi. Ancak kariyerinin zirveye tırmandığı bu dönemde, 1989 yılında "Cennet ve Yeryüzü" (Heaven and Earth) filminin çekimleri sırasında akut miyeloid lösemi teşhisi kondu. Tedavi sürecinde kariyerine ara vermek zorunda kalsa da hastalığı yenerek setlere güçlü bir dönüş yaptı ve Japon Akademisi Ödülleri'nde "Kizuna" (1998) filmindeki rolüyle En İyi Erkek Oyuncu ödülünü kazandı.

Ken Watanabe'nin uluslararası bir yıldıza dönüşmesi, Tom Cruise ile başrolü paylaştığı epik dönem filmi "Son Samuray" (The Last Samurai) (2003) ile gerçekleşti. Filmde canlandırdığı onurlu samuray lideri Katsumoto rolü, ona En İyi Yardımcı Erkek Oyuncu dalında Akademi Ödülü (Oscar) adaylığı getirdi ve Batı sinemasının kapılarını sonuna kadar açtı. Bu başarının ardından Hollywood'un en çok aranan Asyalı aktörlerinden biri oldu. "Bir Geişanın Anıları" (Memoirs of a Geisha) (2005) filminde başrol oynadı ve Christopher Nolan'ın yönettiği "Batman Başlıyor" (Batman Begins) (2005) filminde Ra's al Ghul karakterine (sahte) hayat verdi.

Watanabe, Clint Eastwood'un yönettiği II. Dünya Savaşı draması "Iwo Jima'dan Mektuplar" (Letters from Iwo Jima) (2006) filminde General Tadamichi Kuribayashi'yi canlandırarak kariyerinin en etkileyici performanslarından birini sergiledi. Christopher Nolan ile işbirliğini "Başlangıç" (Inception) (2010) filmindeki iş adamı Saito rolüyle sürdürdü. Blockbuster dünyasında ise efsanevi canavar serisinin yeniden başlatıldığı "Godzilla" (2014) ve devam filmi "Godzilla II: Canavarlar Kralı" (Godzilla: King of the Monsters) (2019) filmlerinde Dr. Ishiro Serizawa karakteriyle yer aldı. Ayrıca "Transformers: Kayıp Çağ" (Transformers: Age of Extinction) (2014) ve "Transformers: Son Şövalye" (Transformers: The Last Knight) (2017) filmlerinde Drift karakterini seslendirdi.

Sinemanın yanı sıra tiyatroda da büyük başarılar elde eden Watanabe, 2015 yılında Lincoln Center'da sahnelenen "Kral ve Ben" (The King and I) müzikalindeki Kral rolüyle Broadway'de sahne aldı ve bu performansıyla Tony Ödülü'ne aday gösterilen ilk Japon aktör oldu. Son dönemde Ansel Elgort ile başrolü paylaştığı suç dizisi "Tokyo Vice" (2022-) ve Gareth Edwards'ın bilimkurgu filmi "Yaratıcı" (The Creator) (2023) gibi yapımlarda yer alarak hem Japon hem de Amerikan yapımlarında aktif olarak çalışmaya devam etmektedir.

Richard Timothy Jones is an American actor. He has worked extensively in both film and television productions since the early 1990s. His television roles include Ally McBeal (1997), Judging Amy (1998–2005), CSI: Miami (2006), Girlfriends (2007), Terminator: The Sarah Connor Chronicles (2008-2009), Grey's Anatomy (2010), Hawaii Five-0 (2011–2014), Narcos (2015), and Criminal Minds (2017). Since 2018, he has played Police Sergeant Wade Grey on the ABC police drama The Rookie.

His film roles include portrayals of Lamont Carr in Disney's Full Court Miracle (2003), Laveinio "Slim" Hightower in Rick Famuyiwa's coming-of-age film The Wood (1999), Mike in Tyler Perry's dramatic films Why Did I Get Married? (2007) and Why Did I Get Married Too? (2010), and Captain Russell Hampton in the Hollywood blockbuster Godzilla (2014).
data.name: Richard T. Jones

data.biography: Richard Timothy Jones (altura 1,88 m) nacido el 16 de enero de 1972) es un actor de cine y televisión estadounidense. Jones nació en Kobe, Japón y se crió en Carson, California. Él es el hijo de Lorene. analista informático, y Clarence Jones, jugador profesional de béisbol e instructor de bateo de los Indios de Cleveland. También tiene un hermano mayor llamado Clarence Jones Jr., que ahora trabaja como entrenador. Sus padres se divorciaron más tarde. Jones se graduó de Bishop Montgomery High Escuela en Torrance, California.

理查德·蒂莫西·琼斯（身高 6 英尺 2 英寸（1,88 米）出生于 1972 年 1 月 16 日）是美国电影和电视演员。琼斯出生于日本神户，在加利福尼亚州卡森长大。他是计算机分析师洛琳（Lorene）和职业棒球运动员克拉伦斯·琼斯（Clarence Jones）的儿子，也是克利夫兰印第安人队的击球教练。他还有一个哥哥，名叫小克拉伦斯·琼斯（Clarence Jones Jr.），现在是一名教练。他的父母后来离婚了。琼斯毕业于加利福尼亚州托伦斯的蒙哥马利主教高中。
data.name: 理查德·T·琼斯

data.biography: 理查德·蒂莫西·瓊斯（身高 6 英尺 2 英寸（1, 88 米）出生於 1972 年 1 月 16 日）是美國電影和電視演員。瓊斯出生於日本神戶，在加利福尼亞州卡森長大。他是計算機分析師洛琳（Lorene）和職業棒球運動員克拉倫斯·瓊斯（Clarence Jones）的兒子，也是克利夫蘭印第安人隊的擊球教練。他還有一個哥哥，名叫小克拉倫斯·瓊斯（Clarence Jones Jr. ），現在是一名教練。他的父母後來離婚了。瓊斯畢業於加利福尼亞州託倫斯的蒙哥馬利主教高中。
data.name: 理查德·T·瓊斯

data.biography:
Victor Chatchawit Techarukpong is an actor, emcee and singer born in Prachuap Khiri Khan, Thailand to a Taiwanese father and a Chinese mother. He studied at the University of the Thai Chamber of Commerce. Victor was signed with GMMTV from 2014 to 2023.

Victor started in the entertainment industry by auditioning in singing competitions such as Teen Superstar, The Star and Academy Fantasia. Although he never made the cut, he was eventually given the opportunity to fulfill his dreams of being a singer by signing with GMMTV and releasing the songs "เราเลือกความรักได้เสมอ" (Rao Lueak Khwam Rak Dai Samoe), the OST for Room Alone 401-410 (2014), and "กอดสุดท้าย" (Kot Sutthai).

In 2015, he was tapped to host several television programs such as "Proteen" alongside "Off" Jumpol Adulkittiporn, Oishi Hitz List, and as a backstage host for Asia's Got Talent Season 1 on Channel 3.

He is currently engaged to actress and model Piglet Charada Imraporn who happened to be his co-star in "U-Prince Series: Badass Baker."
data.name: Chatchawit Techarukpong

data.biography: 普拉蒂巴·蘭塔（出生於 2000 年 12 月 17 日）是一位印度女演員，在印地語電影和電視中工作。Ranta 在電視節目 Qurbaan 華 （2020 - 2021） 中首次亮相。此後，她出演了她的電影處女作 Laapataa Ladies （2024） 和網絡聯續劇 Heeramandi （2024）。
data.name: 普拉蒂巴·蘭塔

data.biography: Born Lee Hyuk-soo, he debuted as a model in designer Jung Wook-jun's Lone Costume fashion show in 2006. He walked down the runways of the nation's famous fashion brands including General Idea and Song Zio, and did cover shoots for several renowned fashion magazines such as GQ, Bazaar and Elle. After appearing in music videos of girl groups Gavy NJ and 2NE1 in 2009 and 2010, he expanded his career into acting, using the stage name Lee Soo-hyuk. Lee was mentioned in the online fashion magazine Style Minutes as one of the "13 Top Breakout New Male Faces" during the 2013 Fall/Winter London and Paris fashion weeks. In 2014, Lee signed with Star J Entertainment, leaving his former agency SidusHQ. He then starred as the second male lead in the cable romantic comedy series High School King of Savvy and Valid Love (both from tvN). In 2015, Lee was cast in the period vampire romance Scholar Who Walks the Night, based on the webtoon of the same title.
data.name: Lee Soo-hyuk

data.biography:
Lee Soo-Hyuk é um ator e modelo sul-coreano da YG Entertainment. Ele estreou como modelo no desfile de moda Lone Costume do designer Jung Wook Jun em 2006. Soo Hyuk desfilou nas passarelas de marcas de moda famosas do país, incluindo 'General Idea' e 'Song Zio'. Fez capas para diversas revistas de moda renomadas como GQ, Bazaar e Elle. Depois de aparecer em videoclipes dos grupos femininos Gavy NJ e 2NE1 em 2009 e 2010, ele expandiu sua carreira para atuar. Soo Hyuk fez sua estreia como ator com um papel menor no filme de 2006 'My Boss, My Teacher'. Sua carreira disparou em 2010 graças ao seu papel principal no filme romântico de 2010 'O Garoto de Ipanema', que ganhou diversos prêmios.

Lee Soo Hyuk se alistou no exército em 10 de agosto de 2017 e recebeu alta em 9 de agosto de 2019.

Matsumura Yuki is a Japanese actor who has appeared in nine feature films, as well as a number of television series and theater productions. He is also a singer and has released eight albums and eight singles. He is represented with All-Stars Company.

Matsumura was born in Bunkyo, Tokyo. While attending Tokyo Metropolitan Itabashi High School, he made his debut with the role of Shigetoshi Okita in the television drama Seito Shokun!.

He had a role in the television series Shojo ga Otona ni naru Toki Sono Hosoki Michi broadcast in 1984. After that, he continued regular appearances on the television series Furyu Shojo to Yobarete and School Wars, and in the 1980s he worked as a regular actor of Daiei dramas. He also appeared on the television series Ponytail wa Furimukanai, Furyu Shojo to Yobarete and Chishimai, and 'Hanayomeisho wa Dare ga Kiru.

He made his music recording debut with CBS Sony in 1981. He has released eight albums and eight singles. His singing activities were paused for a while, but he resumed them in 2006 and has continued his live performances which are mainly in Tokyo and Osako.

He is a swordsmith and also a calligrapher. At the age of 30, he was apprenticed to Gyokukan Saotome and started writing. He received the Prime Minister's Prize at the 17th Tokyo Document Exhibition (sponsored by Tokyo Shimbun).
data.name: Yuki Matsumura

data.biography:
Morena Baccarin (born June 2, 1979) is a Brazilian-born American actress most widely known for roles in several American science fiction television shows: as Inara Serra in the series Firefly; as Adria in the series Stargate SG-1; and as Anna in the 2009 version of the series V.

Baccarin was born in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil. Her mother is Brazilian stage and TV actress Vera Setta, and her father is Italian journalist Fernando Baccarin. When she was 7, Baccarin moved with her family to Greenwich Village, New York, as her father was transferred to Globo TV's headquarters in the United States, working as editor. Baccarin attended Public School 41 and New York City Lab School for Collaborative Studies, where she and Claire Danes were classmates. She later attended the Fiorello H. LaGuardia High School of Music & Art and Performing Arts before she entered the theater program at Juilliard. Baccarin landed her first movie role in the improvised fashion world comedy Perfume (2001).
data.name: Morena Baccarin

data.biography:
Morena Baccarin (2 de junio de 1979) es una actriz estadounidense de origen brasileño más conocida por sus papeles en varios programas de televisión estadounidenses de ciencia ficción: como Inara Serra en la serie Firefly, como Adria en la serie Stargate SG, como Anna en la versión 2009 de la serie V y como Leslie Thompkins en la serie Gotham.

En el cine salto a la fama por interpretar a Vanessa en la película Deadpool y su secuela.

💥Морена Силва де Ваз Сетта Баккарин. Родилась в 1979-ом году в Рио-де-Жанейро, Бразилия. Была единственным ребёнком в семье. Отец работал журналистом, а мать была актрисой. Училась в Школе искусств Лагуардия. Работает актрисой. Дважды замужем: за режиссёром Остином Чиком (родился сын Джулиус) и с 2017-го за актёром Беном Маккензи, у пары 2-ое детей: дочь Фрэнсис и сын Артур

🏆Главные награды🏆: Номинация на Эмми (2013) [Родина]

🎬Главные проекты🎬: «Дэдпул» (2016), «Хищные земли» (2024), «Родина» (2011), «Гренландия» (2020)

data.biography:
Morena Baccarin é uma atriz brasileira nascida no Brasil e mais conhecida por papéis em vários programas de televisão americana de ficção científica: como Inara Serra na série Firefly; como Adria na série Stargate SG-1; e como Anna na versão 2009 da série V.

Baccarin nasceu no Rio de Janeiro, Brasil. Sua mãe é a brasileira e atriz de TV Vera Setta, e seu pai é o jornalista italiano Fernando Baccarin. Quando tinha 7 anos, Baccarin se mudou com sua família para Greenwich Village, em Nova York, quando seu pai foi transferido para a sede da TV Globo nos Estados Unidos, trabalhando como editor. Baccarin frequentou a Public School 41 e a New York City Lab School para Collaborative Studies, onde ela e Claire Danes eram colegas. Mais tarde, frequentou a Escola Secundária de Música e Arte e Artes Cênicas Fiorello H. LaGuardia antes de ingressar no programa de teatro na Juilliard. Baccarin conseguiu seu primeiro papel na improvisada comédia de moda Perfume (2001).

Morena Silva de Vaz Setta Baccarin (* 2. Juni 1979 in Rio de Janeiro) ist eine in Brasilien geborene amerikanische Schauspielerin, die am weitesten bekannt ist für ihre Rollen in mehreren amerikanischen Science-Fiction-Fernsehsendungen: als Inara Serra in der Serie Firefly – Der Aufbruch der Serenity (2002), als Adria in der Serie Stargate SG-1 (2006) und als Anna in der 2009er-Version der Serie V – Die Besucher.

Baccarin wurde in Rio de Janeiro, Brasilien, geboren. Ihre Mutter ist die brasilianische Bühnen- und Fernsehschauspielerin Vera Setta, ihr Vater der italienische Journalist Fernando Baccarin. Als sie 7 Jahre alt war, zog Baccarin mit ihrer Familie nach Greenwich Village, New York, als ihr Vater in die Zentrale von Globo TV in den Vereinigten Staaten versetzt wurde und als Redakteur arbeitete. Baccarin besuchte die Public School 41 und die New York City Lab School for Collaborative Studies, wo sie und Claire Danes Klassenkameraden waren. Später besuchte sie die Fiorello H. LaGuardia High School of Music & Art and Performing Arts, bevor sie in das Theaterprogramm von Juilliard eintrat. Mit der improvisierten Modekomödie Perfume (2001) gab Baccarin ihr Filmdebüt.

Morena Silva de Vaz Setta Baccarin (ur. 2 czerwca 1979) – amerykańska aktorka, urodzona w Brazylii. Jej matką jest aktorka Vera Setta, a ojcem dziennikarz Fernando Baccarin. W wieku siedmiu lat przeprowadziła się do Nowego Jorku.[1] Swoją pierwszą rolę odegrała w filmie Perfumy (2001) występując obok takich aktorek jak Carmen Electra czy Michelle Williams. W latach 2002-2003 grała w serialu telewizyjnym Firefly, wcielając się w postać Inary Sierry. W tej roli pojawiła się również w filmie Serenity (2005). Wystąpiła również m.in. w serialach Gwiezdne wrota, V: Goście, Homeland oraz Gotham. W 2016 zagrała w komedii Deadpool obok Ryana Reynoldsa, a dwa lata później w kolejnej części filmu Deadpool 2.

Morena Baccarin (geboren op 2 juni 1979) is een in Brazilië geboren Amerikaanse actrice die vooral bekend staat om haar rollen in verschillende Amerikaanse sciencefictiontelevisieprogramma's: als Inara Serra in de serie Firefly; als Adria in de serie Stargate SG-1; en als Anna in de 2009-versie van de serie V.

Baccarin werd geboren in Rio de Janeiro, Brazilië. Haar moeder is de Braziliaanse toneel- en tv-actrice Vera Setta, en haar vader is de Italiaanse journalist Fernando Baccarin. Toen ze 7 was, verhuisde Baccarin met haar familie naar Greenwich Village, New York, toen haar vader werd overgeplaatst naar het hoofdkantoor van Globo TV in de Verenigde Staten, waar hij als redacteur werkte. Baccarin ging naar Public School 41 en New York City Lab School for Collaborative Studies, waar zij en Claire Danes klasgenoten waren. Ze ging later naar de Fiorello H. LaGuardia High School of Music & Art and Performing Arts voordat ze naar het theaterprogramma van Juilliard ging. Baccarin kreeg haar eerste filmrol in de geïmproviseerde modewereldkomedie Perfume (2001).

Morena Baccarin est une actrice américano-brésilienne, née le 2 juin 1979 à Rio de Janeiro. Fille de l'actrice brésilienne Vera Setta et du journaliste Fernando Baccarin, elle déménage avec sa famille à New York à l'âge de dix ans. Elle poursuit des études au "Fiorello H. LaGuardia High School of Music & Art and Performing Arts", puis intègre la "Juilliard School", où elle se spécialise en théâtre.

Baccarin commence sa carrière d'actrice sur scène, jouant dans des pièces classiques. Elle fait ses débuts au cinéma en 2001 dans le film "Perfume", , où elle joue le rôle de Monica, suivi par un rôle dans "Way Off Broadway"  et Roger Dodger (2002).  En 2005, elle obtient un rôle marquant dans le film "Serenity", où elle incarne Inara Serra, un personnage qu'elle reprend par la suite dans le film dérivé de la série "Firefly".

Au fil des ans, Baccarin apparaît dans plusieurs séries télévisées populaires, notamment "Stargate SG-1", où elle joue Adria, et "V" (2009-2011), où elle interprète Anna. Elle obtient également un rôle en tant que Jessica Brody dans la série "Homeland" (2011-2013) qui lui vaut une nomination aux "Primetime Emmy Awards".

En 2016, elle joue Vanessa Carlysle dans les films "Deadpool" (2016) et "Deadpool 2" (2018) ainsi que dans "Deadpool & Wolverine" (2024).  En parallèle, elle participe à des projets comme "Spy" (2015) et "Greenland" (2020).

Sa filmographie comprend également des rôles dans des productions comme "Fast Charlie" (2023).  Baccarin a également prêté sa voix à des personnages d'animation, notamment Talia al Ghul dans plusieurs films d'animation DC Comics.

Morena Baccarin (d. 2 Haziran 1979) Brezilya doğumlu Amerikalı aktris, en çok çeşitli Amerikan bilim kurgu televizyon dizilerindeki rolleriyle tanınmaktadır: Firefly dizisindeki Inara Serra rolü; Stargate SG-1 dizisindeki Adria rolü; ve V dizisinin 2009 versiyonundaki Anna rolü.

Baccarin Brezilya'nın Rio de Janeiro kentinde doğdu. Annesi Brezilyalı sahne ve TV oyuncusu Vera Setta, babası ise İtalyan gazeteci Fernando Baccarin'dir. Baccarin 7 yaşındayken, babası Globo TV'nin Amerika Birleşik Devletleri'ndeki merkezine editör olarak transfer olduğu için ailesiyle birlikte Greenwich Village, New York'a taşındı. Baccarin, Claire Danes ile sınıf arkadaşı olduğu Public School 41 ve New York City Lab School for Collaborative Studies'e devam etti. Daha sonra Juilliard'da tiyatro programına girmeden önce Fiorello H. LaGuardia Müzik ve Sanat ve Sahne Sanatları Lisesi'ne devam etti. Baccarin ilk film rolünü doğaçlama moda dünyası komedisi Perfume'da (2001) aldı.

Morena Baccarin (Rio de Janeiro, 1979. június 2. –) amerikai-brazil színésznő, szinkronszínésznő, filmszínésznő és televíziós színésznő.

Teljes neve Morena Silva de Vaz Setta Baccarin, amiben az első vagy um. anyai családneve Setta és a második, vagy apai családneve pedig Baccarin. Magyarországon legismertebb szerepe a Homeland – A belső ellenség című tv-sorozatban alakított Jessica Brody, mely alakításáért Emmy-díjra jelölték női mellékszereplő (dráma kategóriában) 2013-ban.

莫瑞娜·巴卡琳（Morena Baccarin，生于1979年6月2日）是一位出生于巴西的美国女演员，因在多部美国科幻电视剧中的角色而广为人知：在电视剧《萤火虫》（Firefly）中饰演伊娜拉·塞拉；在电视剧《星际之门：SG-1》（Stargate SG-1）中饰演阿德里亚；以及在2009年版电视剧《V星入侵》（V）中饰演安娜。

巴卡琳出生于巴西、里约热内卢。她的母亲是巴西舞台和电视女演员薇拉·塞塔（Vera Setta），父亲是意大利记者费尔南多·巴卡琳（Fernando Baccarin）。7 岁时，巴卡琳随家人搬到纽约格林威治村，因为她的父亲被调往环球电视台在美国的总部担任编辑。巴卡琳就读于公立 41 号学校和纽约市合作学习实验学校，在那里她和克莱尔·丹尼斯（Claire Danes）是同班同学。后来，她进入菲奥雷洛·H·拉瓜迪亚音乐艺术与表演艺术高中，之后进入茱莉亚学院的戏剧专业学习。巴卡琳在即兴创作的时尚界喜剧《香水》（Perfume，2001年）中获得了她的第一个电影角色。
data.name: 莫雷纳·巴卡林

data.biography:
莫瑞娜·巴卡琳（莫蓮娜·芭卡琳，生於 1979 年 6 月 2 日）是一位出生於巴西的美國女演員，因在多部美國科幻電視劇中的角色而廣為人知：在電視劇《螢火蟲》（Firefly）中飾演伊娜拉·塞拉；在電視劇《星際之門：SG-1》（Stargate SG-1）中飾演阿德里亞；以及在 2009 年版電視劇《V 星入侵》（V）中飾演安娜。

巴卡琳出生於巴西、裏約熱內盧。她的母親是巴西舞台和電視女演員薇拉·塞塔（Vera Setta），父親是義大利記者費爾南多·巴卡琳（Fernando Baccarin）。7 歲時，巴卡琳隨家人搬到紐約格林威治村，因為她的父親被調往環球電視台在美國的總部擔任編輯。巴卡琳就讀於公立 41 號學校和紐約市合作學習實驗學校，在那裏她和克萊爾·丹尼斯（Claire Danes）是同班同學。後來，她進入菲奧雷洛·H·拉瓜迪亞音樂藝術與表演藝術高中，之後進入茱莉亞學院的戲劇專業學習。巴卡琳在即興創作的時尚界喜劇《香水：一個殺人者的故事》（Perfume，2001 年）中獲得了她的第一個電影角色。
data.name: 莫蓮娜·芭卡琳

data.biography: Η Μορένα Μπακαρίν (Morena Baccarin) είναι Αμερικανίδα ηθοποιός. Είναι γνωστή για την ερμηνεία της Inara Serra στην τηλεοπτική σειρά επιστημονικής φαντασίας Firefly και της επόμενης ταινίας Serenity, η Vanessa στις κωμωδίες υπερηρώων Deadpool, Deadpool 2 και Deadpool & Wolverine, η Jessica Brody στη σειρά θρίλερ Homeland (2011–2013) και Leslie Thompkins στη σειρά υπερήρωων Gotham (2015–2019). Για το Homeland, ήταν υποψήφια για το βραβείο Primetime Emmy για τον εξαιρετικό δεύτερο γυναικείο ρόλο σε δραματική σειρά το 2013.
data.name: Μορένα Μπακαρίν

data.biography:
Morena Baccarin (nata il 2 giugno 1979) è un'attrice americana di origine brasiliana nota soprattutto per i ruoli in diverse serie televisive di fantascienza americane: come Inara Serra nella serie Firefly; come Adria nella serie Stargate SG-1; e come Anna nella versione del 2009 della serie V.

Baccarin è nata a Rio de Janeiro, in Brasile. Sua madre è l'attrice teatrale e televisiva brasiliana Vera Setta, e suo padre è il giornalista italiano Fernando Baccarin. Quando aveva 7 anni, Baccarin si trasferì con la sua famiglia al Greenwich Village, New York, mentre suo padre fu trasferito al quartier generale di Globo TV negli Stati Uniti, lavorando come redattore. Baccarin ha frequentato la Public School 41 e la New York City Lab School for Collaborative Studies, dove lei e Claire Danes erano compagne di classe. In seguito ha frequentato la Fiorello H. LaGuardia High School of Music & Art and Performing Arts prima di entrare nel programma teatrale della Juilliard. Baccarin ha ottenuto il suo primo ruolo cinematografico nella commedia improvvisata del mondo della moda Perfume (2001).

data.biography: Katherine LaNasa is an American actress, former ballet dancer and choreographer. She starred in films Jayne Mansfield's Car, The Campaign, and The Frozen Ground. On television, LaNasa had a leading role in the NBC sitcom Three Sisters (2001–2002) and Truth be Told (2019-present), appeared in recurring roles on Judging Amy, Two and a Half Men, Big Love and Longmire, and starred in the short-lived dramas Love Monkey (2006), Deception (2013), Satisfaction (2014–15) and Imposters (2017–18). In 2020, LaNasa portrayed Gloria Grandbilt in the musical dramedy series Katy Keene.
data.name: Katherine LaNasa

data.biography:
LaNasa nasceu em New Orleans, Louisiana, filha de Anne (nascida Hardin) e do Dr. James J. LaNasa, Jr., um cirurgião plástico. LaNasa começou a dançar aos 12 anos e, aos 14, foi aceita na Escola de Artes da Carolina do Norte em Winston-Salem, Carolina do Norte. Depois de um estágio no Milwaukee Ballet, LaNasa dançou no Ballet West de Salt Lake City e no Karole Armitage Ballet.

LaNasa auxiliou John Carrafa na coreografia do filme de 1989, Rooftops. Ela fez sua estreia nas telas com um pequeno papel no filme Catchfire (1990) e nos anos seguintes apareceu no cinema e na televisão. LaNasa interpretou o papel principal de Bess Bernstein-Flynn Keats na série de comédia da NBC, Three Sisters (2001-2002), que foi cancelada após duas temporadas. Ela foi uma estrela da curta série da CBS Love Monkey (2006), no papel de Karen Freed, e 12 Miles of Bad Road da HBO.

LaNasa apareceu em papéis especiais em várias séries de televisão, incluindo CSI: Crime Scene Investigation, Grey's Anatomy, ER, House MD, Justice, Two and a Half Men e Seinfeld. Ela interpretou a personagem recorrente Yvonne Dunbar em Judging Amy, Kim McPherson em The Guardian e Beverly Ford em Big Love. Seus créditos no cinema incluem Kiss & Tell (1996), Schizopolis (1996), Alfie (2004), Dia dos Namorados (2010), Jayne Mansfield's Car (2012), The Campaign (2012) e The Frozen Ground (2012). LaNasa estrela a série dramática da NBC Deception, que estreou como uma substituição no meio da temporada durante a temporada de televisão de 2012–13, como Sophia Bowers. Cônjuge: Grant Show, (18 de agosto de 2012 - presente) French Stewart, (19 de maio de 1998 - dezembro de 2009) (divorciado) Dennis Hopper, (17 de junho de 1989 - abril de 1992) (divorciado) 1 filho.

LaNasa出生于路易斯安那州的新奥尔良，是Anne（Née Hardin）和Dr. James J. LaNasa的女儿。Dr. James J. LaNasa是一名整形外科医生。LaNasa从12岁开始跳舞，14岁时，她被北卡罗来纳州温斯顿-塞勒姆的北卡罗来纳州艺术学院录取。在密尔沃基芭蕾舞团当学徒后，LaNasa与盐湖城西部芭蕾舞团和Karole Armitage芭蕾舞团共舞。

LaNasa协助John Carrafa为1989年的电影《屋顶》编舞。她在电影《Catchfire》（1990年）中首次在银幕上扮演了一个小角色，并在随后的几年出现在电影和电视中。LaNasa在NBC喜剧系列《三姐妹》（2001-2002）中饰演Bess Bernstein-Flynn Keats，该剧在两季后被取消。她是哥伦比亚广播公司短命系列剧《Love Monkey》（2006年）的明星，饰演Karen Freed和HBO的《12英里的坏路》。

LaNasa在许多电视剧中担任嘉宾角色，包括《犯罪现场调查》、《实习医生格蕾》、《急诊室》、《众议院医学博士》、《正义》、《两个半男人》和《宋飞正传》。她在《审判艾米》中扮演反复出现的角色伊冯·邓巴，在《卫报》中扮演金·麦克弗森，在《大爱》中扮演贝弗利·福特。她的电影作品包括Kiss & Tell（1996年）、Schizopolis（1996年）、Alfie（2004年）、情人节（2010年）、Jayne Mansfield的汽车（2012年）、The Campaign（2012年）和The Frozen Ground（2012年）。LaNasa在NBC电视剧《欺骗》中饰演Sophia Bowers，该系列剧在2012-13年电视剧季中作为季中替补首次亮相。配偶：格兰特秀，（2012年8月18日至今）法国斯图尔特，（1998年5月19日至2009年12月）（离婚）丹尼斯·霍珀，（1989年6月17日至1992年4月）（离婚）1个孩子。
data.name: 凱瑟琳·拉娜莎

data.biography:
Katherine LaNasa est une actrice américaine née le 1er décembre 1966 à La Nouvelle-Orléans (Louisiane).

Katherine a été mariée à Dennis Hopper le 17 juin 1989. Ils ne seront restés mariés qu'environ trois ans puisqu'ils divorcèrent en 1992. De cette union naquit Henry Lee Hopper en septembre 1990.

Le 19 mai 1998, elle se remaria avec l'acteur américain French Stewart après s'être rencontrés deux ans plus tôt sur le plateau de Troisième planète après le Soleil.

Katherine et French exploitent plusieurs zoos dans la zone d'Albuquerque.

Elle est mariée à l'acteur Grant Show depuis 2012 avec qui elle a une fille, Eloise, née en 2014.

LaNasa je rođena u New Orleansu, savezna država Louisiana, kao kći Anne (rođena Hardin) i dr. Jamesa J. LaNase Jr., plastičnog kirurga. LaNasa je počela plesati u dobi od 12 godina, a sa 14 godina primljena je u Umjetničku školu Sjeverne Karoline u Winston-Salemu, Sjeverna Karolina. Nakon stažiranja u Milwaukee Balletu, LaNasa je plesala s Ballet Westom iz Salt Lake Cityja i Karole Armitage Balletom.

LaNasa je asistirala Johnu Carrafi u koreografiji za film "Rooftops" iz 1989. Godine. Na filmskom platnu se prvi put pojavila u maloj ulozi u filmu "Catchfire" (1990), a u narednim godinama pojavljivala se u filmovima i televiziji. LaNasa je glumila glavnu ulogu Bess Bernstein-Flynn Keats u NBC-jevoj humorističnoj seriji "Three Sisters" (2001.-2002.), koja je otkazana nakon dvije sezone. Bila je zvijezda kratkotrajne CBS-ove serije "Love Monkey" (2006), gdje je tumačila lik Karen Freed, te HBO-ove serije "12 Miles of Bad Road".

LaNasa 出生於路易斯安那州的新奧爾良，是 Anne（Née Hardin）和 Dr.James J.LaNasa 的女兒。Dr.James J.LaNasa 是一名整形外科醫生。LaNasa 從 12 歲開始跳舞，14 歲時，她被北卡羅來納州温斯頓 - 塞勒姆的北卡羅來納州藝術學院錄取。在密爾沃基芭蕾舞團當學徒後，LaNasa 與鹽湖城西部芭蕾舞團和 Karole Armitage 芭蕾舞團共舞。

LaNasa 協助 John Carrafa 為 1989 年的電影《屋頂》編舞。她在電影《Catchfire》（1990 年）中首次在銀幕上扮演了一個小角色，並在隨後的幾年出現在電影和電視中。LaNasa 在 NBC 喜劇系列《虐是一家人》（2001 - 2002）中飾演 Bess Bernstein - Flynn Keats，該劇在兩季後被取消。她是哥倫比亞廣播公司短命系列劇《Love Monkey》（2006 年）的明星，飾演 Karen Freed 和 HBO 的《12 英裏的壞路》。

LaNasa 在許多電視劇中擔任嘉賓角色，包括《犯罪現場調查》、《實習醫生格蕾》、《急診室》、《眾議院醫學博士》、《劫後難逃》、《兩個半男人》和《宋飛正傳》。她在《審判艾米》中扮演反覆出現的角色伊馮·鄧巴，在《衞報》中扮演金·麥克弗森，在《大愛》中扮演貝弗利·福特。她的電影作品包括 Kiss & Tell（1996 年）、Schizopolis（1996 年）、Alfie（2004 年）、情人節（2010 年）、Jayne Mansfield 的汽車（2012 年）、The Campaign（2012 年）和 The Frozen Ground（2012 年）。LaNasa 在 NBC 電視劇《欺騙》中飾演 Sophia Bowers，該系列劇在 2012 - 13 年電視劇季中作為季中替補首次亮相。配偶：格蘭特秀，（2012 年 8 月 18 日至今）法國斯圖爾特，（1998 年 5 月 19 日至 2009 年 12 月）（離婚）丹尼斯·霍珀，（1989 年 6 月 17 日至 1992 年 4 月）（離婚）1 個孩子。
data.name: 凱瑟琳·拉娜莎
Giang Hồ Dạ Vũ Thập Niên Đăng
data.overview: Mộ Thanh Yến, một thiếu chủ thâm độc bí hiểm hành sự quyết đoán cùng Thái Chiêu, một nữ hiệp không tranh với đời tính tình thoải mái và sáng suốt, có một màn giằng co giữa hai kẻ mạnh và tạo nên một mối tình ngọt ngào xen lẫn đau thương. Giữa chốn giang hồ quỷ quyệt khôn lường, hai người chung tay xé tan lớp mặt nạ giả dối của nhân sĩ võ lâm, trải qua yêu hận đan xen, vô vàn ngã rẽ, đấu trí không ngừng, khắc họa nên bức chân dung hiệp nghĩa đầy hơi thở nhân gian.
